'''Timi Rotramel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who represented the planet [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] and [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]] in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
[[File:RotramelDeath.jpg|thumb|left|Timi Rotramel is killed by Darth Vader.]]

Senator Rotramel's representation ended before the Senate's dissolution in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], when the planet Dac was [[Subjugation of Mon Calamari|enslaved]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Timi was among those who joined the growing [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] against the corrupt [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]-led government.

Travelling to [[Tiss'sharl]] in secret as an [[Envoy/Legends|envoy]], Senator Rotramel tried to recruit [[President of the Tiss'sharl League|President]] [[Si-Di-Ri]] of the [[Tiss'sharl League]] to the Rebel Alliance, using the recent Alliance [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|victory]] at [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin]] to persuade the latter into allowing the establishment of a potential base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="Power">[[Empire 31|''Empire'' 31]]</ref> The two were [[Telekinesis/Legends|interrupted]] by the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]]' [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]],<ref name="kenner">{{KennerCite|set=Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (toy line)|pack=Darth Vader vs. Prince Xizor|link=soteKxizor-vader.asp}}</ref> [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who had used President Si-Di-Ri as an unwitting pawn in an attempt to lure [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] herself. After struggling to fire a pull-out [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster]], Senator Rotramel was [[Death/Legends|killed]] midway [[Lightsaber/Legends|by]] [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Vader.<ref name="Power2">[[Empire 31|''Empire'' 31]]</ref>

{{Char-stub}}
